objective: Add a repository guard preventing committed local build artifacts such as atlas binaries.
implementation: Added a production-readiness guard that rejects tracked or local build artifacts before any readiness build runs.
The guard covers root atlas binaries and cmd/atlas-local binaries on Unix and Windows names.
Added a regression test that requires the build-artifact guard wiring and failure messages in production-readiness.sh.
Added node 13 post-merge lifecycle evidence after PR 316 CI, merge, sync, and branch cleanup.
